appearance.story.senera: The original Senera palette: warm paper, deep ink, and a single terra accent.
appearance.story.classic: A familiar modern gray scale: clean, restrained, and dependable.
appearance.story.mono: Pure neutral gray that leaves all attention to the content.
appearance.story.forest: A quiet misty gray-green for low-stimulation, long sessions.
appearance.story.sakura: Low-saturation pink paper with a warm, bookish softness.
appearance.story.ocean: A restrained, translucent gray-blue that gives the workbench quiet distance.
appearance.story.lavender: A very light lavender with a little romance that stays out of the way.
appearance.story.matcha: A calm blend of milk and green that keeps tool work feeling grounded.
appearance.story.honey: A warm apricot cream with a soft glow and no heaviness.
appearance.story.celadon: A restrained gray-green inspired by celadon glaze.
